mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (user_id, product_id, group_id, favor_price) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{groupId}, #{favorPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE favorite SET group_id = #{groupId}, favor_price = #{favorPrice} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT * FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}

DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id IN
#{pid}
mapper.update: UPDATE favorite SET group_id = #{groupId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}

UPDATE favorite SET group_id = #{groupId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id IN
#{pid}
UPDATE favorite SET group_id = NULL WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
